name: The Dilemma
short_description: Step into a psychological thriller and mystery adventure that will challenge your mind! Face fear and uncertainty in three labyrinths, where each step reveals secrets and puzzles that lead you deeper into a maze. Walk the fine line between reality and imagination.
detailed_description:
When you open your eyes in the pitch-black maze, there's only one thing you need to do. Escape this cursed labyrinth!

The Dilemma, developed by an independent developer team, is a game that will surpass players' expectations with its deep storyline and sense of loneliness.

In a challenging labyrinth filled with creatures, you'll be pushed to your limits as you try to survive, evade the creatures, and collect various notes to maintain the integrity of the story. Don't forget that you'll be challenged more than you think in this experience!

Containing three types of challenging mazes, The Dilemma blends simple gameplay mechanics to deliver tension to the player until the end. This experience, which will require you to enter every corridor in the maze, also holds various notes and mysteries for the player to uncover.

supported_languages:
English*, Turkish, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
*languages with full audio support
